description: Rust HTTP/2 server that directly calls hyper's http2_only() and serve_connection(), triggering CVE-2023-26964 HTTP/2 DoS vulnerability.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: main.rs directly calls Http::new().http2_only(true).serve_connection() which are the vulnerable functions for the HTTP/2 DoS.

findings.human_justification: http2_only() and serve_connection() are called directly in main(), making the HTTP/2 DoS vulnerability exploitable.
